basics.description: Deploy Keysight CloudLens Manager (CLMS) v6.13.076 from Azure Marketplace. CLMS is the central control plane for CloudLens network visibility. After deployment, the web UI is reachable in about 60 seconds and full initialization completes in roughly 15 minutes. Default UI credentials: admin / Cl0udLens@dm!n (change on first login).

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for deployment. Pick the region closest to your monitored workloads to minimize latency.

elements.name: vmName
elements.label: VM name
elements.toolTip: Name of the CLMS VM. Used as the computer name and as a prefix for the public IP, NSG, NIC, and (when creating one) the VNet.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 3 to 64 characters. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. Must start and end with a letter or digit.

elements.name: adminUsername
elements.label: Linux admin username
elements.toolTip: OS-level admin user for SSH. The CLMS web UI uses its own separate admin account (admin / Cl0udLens@dm!n).

toolTip.password: 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, a digit, and a symbol. This is the OS-level password, not the CLMS web UI password.

constraints.customValidationMessage: Password must be 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, a digit, and a symbol.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: VM size
elements.toolTip: Standard_D4s_v5 (4 vCPU, 16 GB) is recommended for most deployments. Scale up for environments managing thousands of sensors.

allowedValues.label: Standard_D16s_v5 (16 vCPU, 64 GB, very large fleets)

elements.name: vnetMode
elements.label: Virtual network
elements.toolTip: Create a new VNet sized below, or attach to a VNet you already own.

elements.name: addressSpace
elements.label: VNet address space (CIDR)
elements.toolTip: Address space for the new VNet. Must not overlap with VNets you plan to peer with.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid CIDR block (for example, 10.50.0.0/16).

elements.name: subnetPrefix
elements.label: Subnet prefix (CIDR)
elements.toolTip: Subnet prefix for the CLMS NIC. Must be contained within the VNet address space.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid CIDR block (for example, 10.50.1.0/24).

elements.name: existingVnetName
elements.label: Existing VNet name
elements.toolTip: Name of the existing VNet to deploy into.

elements.name: existingVnetResourceGroup
elements.label: Existing VNet resource group
elements.toolTip: Resource group of the existing VNet. Leave blank to use this deployment's resource group.

elements.name: existingSubnetName
elements.label: Existing subnet name
elements.toolTip: Subnet within the existing VNet to attach the CLMS NIC to.
